articles.title: Workers' job market gloom has increased dramatically over the past few years, Gallup survey finds - AP News
articles.description: A new Gallup survey finds that Americans’ outlook on the job market is increasingly pessimistic. The negative shift may seem incongruous with the low unemployment rate, but the findings likely reflect an ongoing hiring drought. Just 28% of workers in a quarte…
articles.content: WASHINGTON (AP) Americans outlook on the job market has turned increasingly pessimistic, a surprisingly negative shift given the low unemployment rate but one that likely reflects an ongoing hiring d… [+4397 chars]

articles.title: Trump puts Republicans in a bind on the DHS shutdown: From the Politics Desk - NBC News
articles.description: President Donald Trump rejected an off-ramp to the DHS shutdown and instead called on congressional Republicans to refuse any deal with Democrats unless they agree to pass the SAVE America Act.
